title: Phase 4 pilot documentation task
objective: Validate supervised local use by documenting the phase 4 safety and execution model for the harness.
context: FASE 3 already proved the simulated orchestration loop. This pilot keeps the work local, small, and easy to roll back.
constraints: Keep the task inside the harness repository.
Do not distribute work across machines.
Do not launch real agents automatically.
acceptance_criteria: A phase 4 local execution mode exists.
The work remains local and supervised.
The report explains the human approval boundary.
The change can be rolled back with minimal effort.
implementer_prompt: Prepare the phase 4 safety and local execution documentation for supervised local use. Keep the scope narrow and auditable.
reviewer_prompt: Review the pilot documentation for safety, scope control, and rollback clarity before any broader phase 4 work proceeds.
